verdict_reason: Route lacks Joi validation for the referenceNumber path parameter as required by Hapi best practices; validation should be added to reject malformed requests at the routing layer.

todos.issue: Path parameter 'referenceNumber' lacks route-level format validation; should be validated via Joi schema in options.validate.params
todos.fix: Add options object with validate.params Joi schema to match the {referenceNumber} pattern, similar to notificationView route (notification-view/index.js)
